User.title: User
User.description: User profile with customized Pomodoro durations, XP, levels, and preferences.

shortBreakDuration.description: Short break timer duration in minutes

longBreakDuration.description: Long break timer duration in minutes

dailyGoal.description: Target count of daily focus segments

level.description: User experience level derived from XP

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: A record of a completed focus or break session.

id.description: Unique ID of the activity record

taskName.description: Optional name of the task focused on

completed.description: Whether the session was fully completed

syncedToCalendar.description: Whether this was exported to Google Calendar

calendarEventId.description: ID of Google Calendar event if exported

Badge.title: Badge
Badge.description: Gamification milestone earned by the user.

id.description: Unique ID of the earned badge

badgeId.description: Reference identifier of the predefined badge type

description.description: Description of the milestone met to unlock the badge

/users/{userId}.description: User configuration, personalization variables, and profile stats.

/users/{userId}/activities/{activityId}.description: Activity history tracking Pomodoro focus sessions and completed intervals.
